message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="T4 test-agent: Task CRUD tests">
You are test-agent for task T4: M2 - Task Service + Controller.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- Task: Implement Task CRUD service and REST controller with pagination, search, and filter.
  ALLOWED files (2):
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java

  Key requirements:
  - TaskService: createTask(userId, req), getTask(id), updateTask(id, req), deleteTask(id) — soft delete, listTasks(keyword, priority, status, pageable)
  - TaskController: POST /api/tasks (201), GET /api/tasks/{id} (200), PUT /api/tasks/{id} (200), DELETE /api/tasks/{id} (204), GET /api/tasks (200 with pagination)
  - Extract user ID from SecurityContext (JwtAuthenticationFilter sets UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken with principal = userId as Long)
  - Pagination: page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt,desc default
  - Query params: keyword, priority, status filters
  - Error: 404 for not found/soft-deleted, 400 for validation, 401 for unauthorized
  - Error format: {"message": "..."}

  AC: M2-AC1-16 (all)

- PLAN: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- READONLY context (T1+T2+T3 implementations — read ALL to understand patterns):
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\entity\Task.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\repository\TaskRepository.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\dto\TaskRequest.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\dto\TaskResponse.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\dto\TaskPageResponse.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\entity\User.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\security\JwtTokenProvider.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\config\SecurityConfig.java
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\controller\AuthController.java (for controller pattern)
  - C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\service\AuthService.java (for service pattern)
- Test directory: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\test\java\com\taskflow\
- Log output: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\logs\test-agent-4.log.md

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests.

TEST DESIGN:
1. TaskServiceTest (unit test with Mockito): mock TaskRepository. Test createTask, getTask (found/not found/soft-deleted), updateTask, deleteTask (soft), listTasks with various filter combos.
2. TaskControllerIntegrationTest (@SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc): full HTTP tests.
   - IMPORTANT: Need JWT token for auth. Use the actual auth flow: register a user via POST /api/auth/register, login via POST /api/auth/login, extract token, use in subsequent requests.
   - Test all 16 ACs: create (201), default priority MEDIUM (AC2), missing title (AC3), get by id (AC4), not found (AC5), update (AC6), delete 204 (AC7), soft-deleted not in list (AC8), soft-deleted returns 404 (AC9), list pagination (AC10), keyword search (AC11), priority filter (AC12), page param (AC13), no token 401 (AC14), title too long (AC15), description too long (AC16)

IMPORTANT: Read AuthController.java and AuthService.java to understand the auth pattern — how to register/login and get a token for authenticated requests. Read Task.java, TaskRepository.java, TaskRequest.java, TaskResponse.java, TaskPageResponse.java to understand the data model the service/controller will work with.

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES: Write to C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\temp\impl-notes-4.md

Tech: Spring Boot 3.2.3, Java 17, NO Lombok, JUnit 5, MockMvc, Mockito

OUTPUT:
- Write test files
- Write implementation notes
- Return: test file paths + count summary
</teammate-message>

     2→[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
     6→[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
     9→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage

file.content:
[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5

content.content:
1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
    17→[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body
    22→
    23→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    24→[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
    25→[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
    26→[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
    27→[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    30→

[SECTION] API Contract
[VERSION] 1

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body

[SECTION] State Machine Rules
[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)

[SECTION] Amendment Log

input.content:
# Test Agent 4 Log — T4: Task Service + Controller Tests

## Context Read
- Read all READONLY files: Task.java, TaskRepository.java, TaskRequest.java, TaskResponse.java, TaskPageResponse.java, User.java, JwtTokenProvider.java, JwtAuthenticationFilter.java, SecurityConfig.java, AuthController.java, AuthService.java
- Read PLAN.md and CONTRACT.md
- Studied AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java and AuthServiceTest.java for patterns

## Test Files Written

### 1. TaskServiceTest.java (unit test, Mockito)
Path: `backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskServiceTest.java`
- **CreateTask** (6 tests): create returns response, sets createdBy, default MEDIUM priority, explicit priority, status TODO, sets title/description
- **GetTask** (4 tests): found, not found throws, soft-deleted throws, maps all fields
- **UpdateTask** (4 tests): update returns response, not found throws, sets updatedAt, preserves createdBy/status
- **DeleteTask** (3 tests): soft deletes (sets deleted=true), not found throws, never hard deletes
- **ListTasks** (7 tests): returns page response, keyword filter, priority filter, status filter, combined filters, empty page, only non-deleted

**Total: 24 unit tests**

### 2. TaskControllerIntegrationTest.java (integration, @SpringBootTest + MockMvc)
Path: `backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskControllerIntegrationTest.java`
- Uses real auth flow: register user -> login -> extract JWT token in @BeforeEach
- **CreateTask** (7 tests): AC1 (201 + response), AC2 (default MEDIUM), AC3 (missing/blank title -> 400), AC15 (title boundary 200/201), AC16 (desc boundary 5000/5001)
- **GetTask** (3 tests): AC4 (200), AC5 (404 not found), AC9 (404 soft-deleted)
- **UpdateTask** (3 tests): AC6 (200 updated), AC6 (404 not found), blank title 400
- **DeleteTask** (3 tests): AC7 (204), AC7 (404 not found), AC8 (not in list after delete)
- **ListTasks** (6 tests): AC10 (pagination), AC10 (empty), AC11 (keyword + case-insensitive), AC12 (priority/status filter), AC13 (page params + second page)
- **Auth** (6 tests): AC14 (401 for all 5 endpoints without token, 401 with invalid token)
- **E2E** (1 test): full Create -> Read -> Update -> Delete flow

**Total: 29 integration tests**

### 3. impl-notes-4.md
Path: `docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/temp/impl-notes-4.md`
- TaskService method signatures and implementation guidance
- TaskController structure with annotations
- SecurityContext userId extraction pattern
- Exception handling pattern (follow AuthController)
- Task->TaskResponse mapping
- Framework pitfalls: @Valid required, @PageableDefault sort, principal is Long, 204 no body, soft delete only

## AC Coverage
| AC | Covered By |
|----|-----------|
| AC1 | CreateTask 201 + response fields |
| AC2 | Default MEDIUM priority |
| AC3 | Missing/blank title -> 400 |
| AC4 | Get by id -> 200 |
| AC5 | Not found -> 404 |
| AC6 | Update -> 200 |
| AC7 | Delete -> 204 |
| AC8 | Soft-deleted not in list |
| AC9 | Soft-deleted -> 404 on get |
| AC10 | Pagination response |
| AC11 | Keyword search |
| AC12 | Priority filter |
| AC13 | Page params |
| AC14 | No token -> 401 |
| AC15 | Title > 200 -> 400 |
| AC16 | Description > 5000 -> 400 |
